column1: C[amybot-ddk: I'm a double-digit kyu bot, playing 20k-10k games. Suggest a handicap in the game request if it's too hard or too easy. Good luck, have fun!
amybot-ddk: Thank you for the game! If I did something annoying or glitchy - let me know in this chat, in the site chat or by chatting to my administrator. We'll get it sorted.
